name: hyperwave-engine
description: HyperWave engine: P2P stadium wave over Hyperswarm/Hypercore with WDK payments, host-agnostic, runs under Bare.
author: Mokhtar Naamani <mokhtar.naamani@gmail.com>

scripts.lint:jsdoc: tsc --noEmit --allowJs --checkJs --strict --skipLibCheck --maxNodeModuleJsDepth 0 --target es2022 lib/ring.js lib/attest.js lib/messages.js lib/sweep.js lib/feed.js lib/feed-crdt.js lib/flood.js lib/rate-limiter.js lib/peer-table.js lib/entry.js lib/wave.js lib/wallet.js lib/tron-wallet.js lib/tron-usdt-wallet.js lib/cashu-wallet.js lib/cashu-burn.js lib/nums.js lib/proof-store.js lib/bare-web-shims.js lib/payments.js lib/engine.js lib/rpc.js 2>&1 | grep -E 'error TS80' ; test $? -eq 1
